subject: Re: Computer hackers
body:
contact each

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> These are computer people focusing on viruses etc.
> that I *found via the
> computer hacker convention you suggested*. Let me
> know if I should try
> to contact any of them.
> 
>    1.  Mark Stamp - information security,
> networking, cryptography.
>    Assistant professor at Dept of Computer Science,
> San Jose State University.
>    2. Joe Steward - Senior Security Researcher w/
> LURHQ. Researches
>    unusual Internet activity, *new attack
> techniques*.
>    3. Irby Thompson - Senior Security Engineer for
> Advanced Technology
>    Laboratories of Lockheed Martin. Operating system
> security and applied
>    cryptography.
>    4. Mathew Monroe - computer embedded systems and
> security. Senior
>    Security Engineer at Lockheed Martin Advanced
> Technology Laboratories
>    5. Peleus Uhley - Principle Security Consultant
> w/ Symantec
>    Professional services - kiosk security
>    6. Valsmith - malware - member of Cult of the
> Dead Cow NSP. Founded
>    Offensive Computing.
>    7. *Danny Quist - malware, hacking, virus
> attacks*
>    8. Randal Vaughn - *cyber warfare, cyber
> defense,* internet threat
>    metrics and reporting. Board of Advisors for MI5
> security. Academic
>    associate for AntiphisingWorkingGroup.
>    9. Paul Vixie - hacking, malware. President of
> ISC.
> 
> *IT Dave knew of this guy, a super computer hacker:*
> *Kevin Armentrout* MCSE, CISSP, CEH, SCSP Security
> Practice Manager Nortec
> Communications
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
contact each

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

These are computer people focusing on viruses etc.
that I found via the
computer hacker convention you suggested. Let me
know if I should try
to contact any of them.

  1. Mark Stamp - information security,
    networking, cryptography.
    Assistant professor at Dept of Computer Science,
    San Jose State University.
  2. Joe Steward - Senior Security Researcher w/
    LURHQ. Researches
    unusual Internet activity, new attack
    techniques    .
  3. Irby Thompson - Senior Security Engineer for
    Advanced Technology
    Laboratories of Lockheed Martin. Operating system
    security and applied
    cryptography.
  4. Mathew Monroe - computer embedded systems and
    security. Senior
    Security Engineer at Lockheed Martin Advanced
    Technology Laboratories
  5. Peleus Uhley - Principle Security Consultant
    w/ Symantec
    Professional services - kiosk security
  6. Valsmith - malware - member of Cult of the
    Dead Cow NSP. Founded
    Offensive Computing.
  7. Danny Quist - malware, hacking, virus
    attacks
  8. Randal Vaughn - cyber warfare, cyber
    defense,     internet threat
    metrics and reporting. Board of Advisors for MI5
    security. Academic
    associate for AntiphisingWorkingGroup.
  9. Paul Vixie - hacking, malware. President of
    ISC.

IT Dave knew of this guy, a super computer hacker:
Kevin Armentrout MCSE, CISSP, CEH, SCSP Security
Practice Manager Nortec
Communications
